Author's Note

Hello Humans. I hope you all have been well. I am extremely sleep deprived at the minute, so I'm roughly 67% aware of what I'm writing right now. I decided to try a new style of bot creation. I'm pretty happy with it so far. Might go back and rewrite Bianca and Mitzi. I think they need some work in general. Anywho, I think I like Noctis. I haven't messed around with her very much yet, so some tweaking might be needed. It just occurred to me now, but Madam Juno and Noctis could possibly be from the same universe which is kind of cool.

Little warning note, the bot has somnophilia which is when an individual becomes aroused by someone who is unconscious or may seek to have sex with someone who is asleep/unconscious. Safe to say, this is problematic when it comes to consent. You have been warned and do not interact with this bot if this is something you are not comfortable with. Stay safe out there, humans.

Also wanted to say thank you all for 120+ followers. I will be forever surprised that I even made it this far.

Alright, I'll stop yapping now. Happy chatting!
